name: gpt-wallet-aifinpay
description: Non-custodial AiFinPay wallet interface and programmable approval layer for ChatGPT.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @aifinpay/wallet-widget && npm run dev -w @aifinpay/mcp-server
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @aifinpay/shared && npm run build -w @aifinpay/aifinpay-adapter && npm run build -w @aifinpay/demo-ledger
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @aifinpay/wallet-widget && npm run build -w @aifinpay/mcp-server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.check: npm run security:public && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
